action: Recover and preserve the WebDriver BiDi browser-verification decision correction as linked superseded, observed, inferred, and unresolved claims.

progress.memory: The project corrected browser-verification semantics from one flat method transcript to separate ordered browser events and command responses correlated by stable ids, while changing screenshot integrity to decoded image bytes.

claim_states.inferred: downstream adapters emitting synthetic command events are incompatible
claim_states.unresolved: no retained live-browser transcript has yet proven lossless normalization

progress.verification: Artifact and evidence JSON were accepted by the repository contents API and structurally reviewed; source identities and privacy exclusions are explicit.

handoff: Inspect Cloudflare and Vercel browser adapters for synthetic script.evaluate or captureScreenshot events. Preserve any incompatible implementation as an observed historical record, then add a linked corrected implementation record rather than overwriting it.
